fields.label: Processing App URL
fields.description: WebSocket URL of the Alfred Processing App (e.g., wss://alfred-processing.example.com)

fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Authentication key for the Processing App. Stored encrypted.

fields.label: Self-Hosted Mode
fields.description: Enable when running your own Processing App instance

fields.label: Redis URL
fields.description: Redis connection URL for self-hosted mode (e.g., redis://localhost:6379)

fields.label: Pipeline Mode
fields.description: Full: 6-agent SDLC pipeline (highest quality, ~5-10 min per task). Lite: single-agent fast pass (~1 min, ~5x cheaper, good for simple customizations like adding a field or notification). NOTE: If the Alfred Admin Portal is configured, the subscription plan tier may override this setting - the portal's value always wins for SaaS deployments.

fields.label: LLM Provider
fields.description: Select your LLM provider. Ollama works for both local and remote instances.

fields.label: LLM Model
fields.description: Model identifier. For Ollama: ollama/codegemma:7b, ollama/llama3.1. For others: claude-sonnet-4-20250514, gpt-4o

fields.label: LLM API Key
fields.description: API key for the LLM provider. Optional for Ollama (only needed if your Ollama endpoint requires authentication).

fields.label: LLM Base URL
fields.description: Endpoint URL. For local Ollama: http://localhost:11434. For remote Ollama: http://your-server-ip:11434. Leave empty for cloud providers (Anthropic, OpenAI, etc.).

fields.label: Max Tokens
fields.description: Maximum tokens per LLM response

fields.label: Temperature
fields.description: Generation temperature (0.0 = deterministic, 1.0 = creative). Recommended: 0.1 for code generation.

fields.label: Context Window Size
fields.description: Ollama context window (num_ctx). Limits memory usage for large models. Default 8192 is sufficient for agent tasks. Set 0 to use model default (may cause OOM on large models like 70B).

fields.label: Allowed Roles
fields.description: Roles permitted to use Alfred. If empty, defaults to System Manager and roles with Custom Field create permission.

fields.label: Enable Auto Deploy
fields.description: Automatically deploy approved changesets without manual approval

fields.label: Max Retries Per Agent
fields.description: Maximum retry loops before escalation to human

fields.label: Max Tasks Per User Per Hour
fields.description: Rate limit per user. Set to 0 for unlimited.

fields.label: Task Timeout (seconds)
fields.description: Maximum time for a single agent task before timeout

fields.label: Stale Conversation Hours
fields.description: Hours before a paused conversation is marked stale

fields.label: Total Tokens Used
fields.description: Total tokens consumed across all conversations

fields.label: Total Conversations
fields.description: Total conversations completed
